ddls:
CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist who created the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the album */,
  "artwork" TEXT /* Artwork associated with the album */,
  "album_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the album in seconds */,
  "label" TEXT /* Record label of the album */,
  "is_explicit" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the album contains explicit content */,
  "num_tracks" INTEGER /* Number of tracks in the album */,
  "format" TEXT /* Supported music formats */,
  "popularity_score" INTEGER /* A score indicating the popularity of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of music the artist creates */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "artist_bio_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's biography */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of URLs to the artist's social media profiles */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the artist's profile is verified */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user's account */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio */,
  "privacy_settings" TEXT /* JSON object with user's privacy settings */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user has a premium account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the playlist was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the playlist is public */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs who can collaborate on the playlist */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the playlist has been played */,
  "description_html" TEXT /* HTML version of the playlist description for rich text support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the playlist */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the item belongs to */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album the item belongs to */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the item in the playlist */,
  "track_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in seconds */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "is_playable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the track is playable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_items_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlist_items_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listening_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in the listening history */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who listened to the album */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album that was listened to */,
  "listen_date" TEXT /* Date the album was listened to */,
  "listen_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the listening session in seconds */,
  "is_complete" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user listened to the entire album */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for listening (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listening_history_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scrobbles" (
  "scrobble_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scrobble */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album that was scrobbled */,
  "scrobble_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the album has been scrobbled */,
  "last_scrobbled_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last scrobble */,
  "scrobbled_by" TEXT /* JSON array of user IDs who scrobbled the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scrobble_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scrobbles_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purchases" (
  "purchase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purchase */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the purchase */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album that was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the album was purchased */,
  "purchase_amount" TEXT /* Amount paid for the purchase */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the purchase was refunded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purchase_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_purchases_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friends" (
  "friend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who has the friend */,
  "friend_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the friend */,
  "friend_since" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was established */,
  "friend_status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship (e.g., pending, accepted, blocked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friends_friend_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
